message:
test(core): proptest PAC-Bayes telemetry suite + correlation engine regression seed

New proptest suite (357 lines, ft-3kxe.29):
- Telemetry starts at zero for default and arbitrary configs
- observations counter tracks every observe() call exactly
- frame_drops_observed tracks frame_dropped=true observations
- throttle_activations tracks severity > 0.01 outcomes
- starvation_guards tracks starvation guard firings
- posterior_updates tracks post-warmup Bayesian updates
- pane_resets tracks reset_pane() calls exactly
- full_resets tracks reset() calls exactly
- PacBayesTelemetrySnapshot serde roundtrip for arbitrary values
- Counter monotonicity across mixed observe/reset/reset_pane operations

Also commit proptest regression seed for correlation engine telemetry
(cc 6bc1174a... shrinks to count=11).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 6bc1174aa7e4de0e8c2a4271dedf44234fb7be21f1e16390d6e16d6b9581d8fe # shrinks to count = 11
